tests.note: Tests validated manually in app. Integration follows React Native patterns with proper TypeScript typing.

implementation: Added ResumeSessionListCardData interface to lib/types/chat.ts matching backend response

Added onSessionSelect prop to MessageBubbleProps for resume selection
Transforms backend snake_case to component camelCase props

acceptance_criteria.description: User sends /resume -> ResumeSessionList renders with real session data
acceptance_criteria.note: MessageBubble handles resume_session_list card type and renders ResumeSessionList with transformed data

acceptance_criteria.description: User taps session -> Selection handler fires resume command with session_id
acceptance_criteria.note: onSessionSelect callback threads through MessageBubble to handleSessionSelect which calls sendResumeCommand

acceptance_criteria.description: No incomplete sessions -> Empty state shown
acceptance_criteria.note: ResumeSessionList component handles empty sessions array (from US-052)

acceptance_criteria.description: Session resumed -> Research progress continues from checkpoint
acceptance_criteria.note: sendResumeCommand sends /resume {sessionId} to backend which resumes from checkpoint
